commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin inspector dashboard, public summary, and manager-detail reads to query findings by the package's latest release and adds regression coverage for the release-scoped query path.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main stores inspector warnings with releaseId but the affected readers query by packageId, so older-release findings can still appear after a newer clean release. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and the prompt forbids commands that may write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - This collaborator-authored PR should stay in normal maintainer review/CI flow; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair task because no actionable patch defect was found.

target.title: Fix stale plugin validation findings
target.body:
## Summary
- Scope plugin validation summary/count/detail queries to the package's current latest release.
- Keep dashboard validation counts from showing stale findings after a plugin publishes a newer clean version.
- Add regression coverage for signed-out summary and manager detail queries using `by_release_created`.

## Review context
Follow-up from autoreview of merged PR #2525. The merged implementation stored findings per release, but the plugin detail/dashboard reads were by package, so findings from older releases could continue to drive the current plugin validation alert/count after a newer version was published.

## Test Plan
- `bunx vitest run convex/packages.public.test.ts`
- `bun run format:check -- convex/packages.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts`
target.author: patrick-erichsen
